tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.2%), indicating impaired glucose tolerance or prediabetes. Renal function, electrolytes, and glucose are normal. Recommend clinical follow-up for glycemic control and lifestyle modification to prevent progression to diabetes.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Civile di Voghera
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
